auth_password_too_short: Password must be at least {min} characters.
auth_password_too_weak: Choose a password of at least {min} characters.
auth_login_error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth_invite_subtitle: Set a password and agree to the terms of use to activate your account.
auth_invite_missing_token: This link is missing its invitation token.
auth_invite_consent: I agree to use AĒR for scientific research only, in accordance with the responsible-use restrictions of the project licence (§3).
auth_invite_error_invalid_token: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Ask an administrator for a new one.
auth_invite_error_consent_required: You must accept the responsible-use agreement to continue.
auth_invite_error_generic: Could not activate the account. Please try again.
auth_invite_error_invalid_name: Please enter a first and last name (up to 80 characters each).
auth_forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link if an account exists.
auth_forgot_sent: If an account exists for that address, a password-reset link has been sent.
auth_reset_subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth_reset_missing_token: This link is missing its reset token.
auth_reset_done: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
auth_reset_error_invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth_reset_error_generic: Could not reset the password. Please try again.
auth_session_unreachable: Could not reach the server to confirm your session. Your sign-in is unaffected — please retry.
